introSection: Enchanted Airways is a steel roller coaster located at Universal Studios Singapore in Sentosa, Singapore. It is a custom Family Coaster installation from Vekoma which opened with the park on 18 March 2010.

sections.title: Theme
sections.content: Enchanted Airways is located within the Far Far Away themed area, which is based on the Shrek franchise. The area also contains Puss in Boots' Giant Journey.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train is shaped like Dragon, with two Dronkeys (Dragon and Donkey's babies) sitting, one at the front and one at the back.

fullText:
Enchanted Airways is a steel roller coaster located at Universal Studios Singapore in Sentosa, Singapore. It is a custom Family Coaster installation from Vekoma which opened with the park on 18 March 2010.



Enchanted Airways is located within the Far Far Away themed area, which is based on the Shrek franchise. The area also contains Puss in Boots' Giant Journey.

The train is shaped like Dragon, with two Dronkeys (Dragon and Donkey's babies) sitting, one at the front and one at the back.
